data.body: ad42 (oppressed-anthropoid-ibis) IMPLEMENTED + committed 96404c5 (stacked on bffe 34d0f39): autouse conftest guard forcing REBAR_IDENTITY_REQUIRE_AUTHENTICATED=0. Verified: identity tests unaffected (subprocess env), 270 lifecycle tests pass WITH stray global =1, lint clean. Pushed identity stack (673 bffe + ad42). REMAINING Phase 2: 472f (plan blocked E4/G1G2/G6/T8 — AC2 wrongly cites verify-signature; correct=verify-authorship/authorship.signed), cc0b (plan blocked — factually wrong premises: workflow does NOT hard-force --require-authenticated (reads rebar.toml, currently false/advisory); vars.ENFORCE_SINCE does NOT exist (actual=REBAR_IDENTITY_ENFORCE_SINCE env / identity.enforce_since config); tickets-branch mount ALREADY implemented lines 41-52 -> AC1 is confirmation), 9e76 (reconciler inline-sign + bridge YAML), 245e (fetch-secrets.sh materialize + container), 1787 (canary YAML). Then close 297d+epic+land. CHECKPOINT: extraordinarily long session; Phase 1 landed + identity foundation provisioned + ad42 done.
